kutani.t: 九谷瓷(日本17世纪中叶在九谷一带所产的瓷器,以其花样和色彩独具一格著称)

kutaraja.t: 哥打拉夜(印度尼西亚苏门答腊岛西北端城市班达亚齐)

kutch.d:
n. The packet of vellum leaves in which the gold is first
   beaten into thin sheets.
n. See Catechu.

kutenai.t:

kuter's hernia.t: [医] 屈斯特氏疝, 腹股沟浅疝

kutnahorite.t: 镁锰方解石, 镁菱锰矿

kutu.t: [地名] [刚果民主共和国、肯尼亚] 库图

kutuzov.d: n. Russian field marshal who commanded the Russian opposition to Napoleon (1745-1813)

kuvasz.d: n long-established Hungarian breed of tall light-footed but sturdy white dog; used also as a hunting dog

kuwait.d:
n. a seaport on the Persian Gulf and capital of Kuwait
n. an Arab kingdom in Asia on the northwestern coast of the Persian Gulf; a major source of petroleum

n. a native or inhabitant of Kuwait
a. of or relating to the kingdom of Kuwait or its people
a. of or relating to the capital of Kuwait or its residents

kuwaitis.t: n. 科威特人( Kuwaiti的复数形式 )
kuwaitis.d: n. a native or inhabitant of Kuwait

kuybyshev.t: n. 古比雪夫(原苏联城市)

kuznetsk.t: Basin 库兹涅茨煤田[苏联西西伯利亚东南部](简称库兹巴斯)

kuznetsova.t: n. 库兹涅佐娃全名：Svetlana Kuznetsova 俄罗斯网球女运动员，2004年美网冠军，2009年法网冠军。
